title: Meta in Talks to Lease Computing Power to Anthropic
description: Multiple news outlets report that Meta is in discussions to lease computing power to Anthropic in a potential multi-billion dollar deal.

sources.title: Meta in Talks to Lease Computing Power to Anthropic in Potential $10 Billion Deal
Meta in talks to rent some of its billions in AI infrastructure to Anthropic
Anthropic in early talks with Meta to acquire compute power

sections.heading: Deal Negotiations
paragraphs: The New York Times reports that Meta is in talks to lease computing power to Anthropic in a potential $10 billion deal. Similarly, CNN reports that Meta is in talks to rent some of its billions in AI infrastructure to Anthropic.

sections.heading: Acquisition of Compute Power
paragraphs: According to CNBC, Anthropic is in early talks with Meta to acquire compute power.

sections.heading: Search Trend Context
paragraphs: The keyword 'meta' is trending in the ID region with a reported search lower bound of 200. Google Trends analyzes search query data to determine the popularity of specific terms relative to total search volume in a specific region and time.

faq.q: What is the reported value of the potential deal between Meta and Anthropic?
faq.a: According to The New York Times, the deal is potentially worth $10 billion.

faq.q: What are Meta and Anthropic discussing?
faq.a: The New York Times and CNN report that Meta is in talks to lease or rent computing power and AI infrastructure to Anthropic.

faq.q: What stage are the talks in?
faq.a: CNBC reports that Anthropic is in early talks with Meta to acquire compute power.
